{"id":"propertyhack-ncp","title":"Image Generation Service (Google Imagen 3)","description":"Create server/services/imageGenerationService.js that uses Google's Imagen 3 API (via @google/generative-ai SDK, same as our Gemini setup) to generate article illustrations. The service should: 1) Accept article title, shortBlurb, and category as input. 2) Auto-generate an image prompt that produces consistent editorial illustration style - flat/geometric art, not photorealistic - using our brand palette (cream #f0f0f0, black #2b2b2b, gold #d4b038 accents). 3) Call Imagen 3 to generate a 1024x576 (16:9) image. 4) Upload the result to a storage location (start with saving base64 and serving from Express, can move to S3/Cloudinary later). 5) Return the image URL. Include error handling and fallback to placeholder.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"dan@microrocket.com","created_at":"2026-03-07T10:45:27Z","created_by":"prawn47","updated_at":"2026-03-07T10:45:27Z"}
